title: hydrophyllum cochinchinense
intro: Hydrophyllum cochinchinense, also known as Chinese waterleek, is a plant species in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation. Hydrophyllum cochinchinense is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, and its roots and leaves are used in various herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures.
